zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours於1260年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易布萊頌時，她的父親Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon26歲，母親Eléonore de Melun22歲。她和Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc至少有2個女兒。她去世於大約1304年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德波米爾斯享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours was born in 1260, in Blaison, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon, was 26 and her mother, Eléonore de Melun, was 22. She had at least 2 daughters with Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc. She died about 1304, in Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours est née en 1260, à Blaison, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eléonore de Melun, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc. Elle est décédée environ 1304, à Bommiers, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours(이)가 1260년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 블레이슨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eléonore de Melun(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1304년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 봄미어스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Villebéon-Nemours родилась в 1260 г. в местности блеисон, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eléonore de Melun, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Thibault II de Bommiers de Beaumetz du Broc. Она умерла около 1304 г. в местности боммиирс, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 45 лет.
